text: repository follows gsm package development conventions useful early-stage experimental package.

title: Contributing to gsm.safety
text: File link issue describing intended change. Run relevant local checks possible. Keep workflow/report changes tied GitHub issue motivates .

title: Contributing to gsm.safety
text: repository uses GitHub Actions templates Gilead-BioStats/gsm.utils: R-CMD-check.yaml — R CMD check pull requests. test-coverage.yaml — test coverage reporting. pkgdown-.yaml — pkgdown site build/deploy PR previews. r-releaser-caller.yaml — release automation. workflow-template-check.yaml — checks workflow templates gsm.utils. first automation PR intentionally ports standard suite documenting repo-specific follow-work #8.

title: Authors and Citation

what: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: gsm.safety early-stage R package concept bringing clinical safety visualizations inspired SafetyGraphics ecosystem Good Statistical Monitoring (gsm.core) workflows. Initial direction: build lightweight GSM extension/plugin package bridges GSM lData objects mapped domains (Mapped_SUBJ, Mapped_AE, Mapped_LB, etc.) selected SafetyGraphics-style chart artifacts. Avoid forking full safetyGraphics Shiny app; start workflow-generated report artifacts optional gsm.app plugins later.

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: repository newly scaffolded prototype package. currently contains: Integration design AE Explorer gap analysis workr-shaped report workflows inst/workflow/3_reports/ AE Explorer, AE Timelines, Hep Explorer, Paneled Outlier Explorer, Safety Delta Delta, Safety Histogram, Safety Outlier Explorer, Safety Results Time, Safety Shift Plot Interactive SafetyCharts HTML report artifacts rendered safetyCharts::render_widget() Pkgdown menu examples run report YAML workflows workr::RunWorkflow() GitHub Actions R CMD check, pkgdown, coverage, workflow-template checks implemented workflows keep report contract YAML use MakeExampleData() reproducible gsm.datasim-backed examples: meta$domains maps GSM workflow data names, currently Mapped_SUBJ, Mapped_AE, Mapped_LB, domain shapes expected safetyCharts widget. meta$widgetSettings stores widget column mapping used safetyCharts, including sex current example grouping variable supported. Workflows call relevant safetyCharts::init_*() helper one exists; widgets without init helper pass data/settings directly renderer. gsm.safety::RenderSafetyChartsWidget() renders widget safetyCharts::render_widget() writes standalone HTML report. YAML now authoritative configuration, generated HTML widget report artifact. next milestone harden GSM--SafetyCharts mapping contract real gsm.mapping outputs continue hardening gsm.datasim-based example data path.

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: project intentionally use renv yet. dependency surface still changing, MVP first establish core package/API boundaries adding lockfile maintenance. Run AE Explorer workflow example : source checkout, use: pkgdown examples use workr::RunWorkflow() workflow YAML files render returned htmlwidget output. Run local checks : shell R installed:
code: source(system.file("examples", "run-ae-explorer-workflow.R", package = "gsm.safety")) source("inst/examples/run-ae-explorer-workflow.R") rcmdcheck::rcmdcheck(args = "--no-manual") R CMD check --no-manual gsm.safety

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: Define minimal package skeleton. Implement data-contract adapters GSM mapped data SafetyGraphics-style domainData. Render one AE-focused chart artifact Mapped_SUBJ + Mapped_AE gsm.core workflow module. Add validation, tests, small reproducible fixture.
